department: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
external_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Construction, Repair and Improvement of Building
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Construction, Repair and
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Planning and Development Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Building plan, specifications and Bill of Materials – 6 copies
Barangay Clearance for new construction, repair or renovation – 1 original copy
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangay halls where the property is located

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: If applicant is not the owner: Contract of Lease, Deed of Sale, Contract to Sell, or Authorization (2 copies)
checklist_of_requirements.source: Owner of lot and/ or building

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive/ review completeness of requirements and application form and record endorsement from Lipa City Engineering Office, attach action slip and forward to PPD

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.2 Advice the client to return on a specific date

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.3 Conduct site/ ocular inspection

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.4 Prepare and sign inspection report

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.5 Review inspection report, application requirements, note down recommendation and sign inspection report
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Officer III / Planning Officer IV / Assistant CPDC (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.6 Compute corresponding fees
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Officer III / Planning Officer IV (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.7 Prepare Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.8 Sign Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly filled-up application form and all the required documents
steps.agency_action: 1.9 Issue Order of Payment and advise the applicant to pay at the City Treasurer’s Office

steps.client_step: 2. Review Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fees at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk III / II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to Lipa City Planning and Development Office
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Prepare Locational Clearance and endorsement letter to Lipa City Engineering Office
steps.person_responsible: Economist II / Administrative Aide VI (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to Lipa City Planning and Development Office
steps.agency_action: 3.2 Review and sign the Locational Clearance, endorsement letter and building plans
steps.person_responsible: Planning Officer IV / Assistant CPDC / CPDC (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the Locational Clearance and sign in the logbook for acknowledgement
steps.agency_action: 4. Release the Locational Clearance and endorse back building plans to Engineering Office

external_services.total_processing_time: 1 day, 5 hours and 42 minutes (with waiting time)

service_notice.processing_fee: P525.00 for the first P100,000.00 project cost plus P87.50 for every P50,000.00 in excess or a fraction thereof
P1,400.00 for the first P100,000.00 project cost plus P175.00 for every P50,000.00 in excess or a fraction thereof
P1,400.00 for the first P100,000.00 project cost plus P87.50 for every P50,000.00 in excess or a fraction thereof
P1,400.00 for the first P100,000.00 project cost plus P175.00 for every P50,000.00 in excess or a fraction thereof
P10.00/sq. m. of the project area but not less than P8,750.00 and not more than P50,000.00

external_services.office: Lipa City Planning and Development Office
external_services.service_name: Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business and Transfer of Business Location
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Locational Clearance for New Business and Transfer of
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.source: Lipa City Permits and Licensing Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Tax declaration of lot and building – 2 copies

checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective barangays where the business is located

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Legal Documents if not owner (Lease, Deed of Sale, etc.) - 2 copies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Owner of the lot and/or building

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the duly-filled up application form together with all the requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive/review completeness of requirements, advise return date, conduct site inspection, prepare/sign inspection report, review and recommend approval, compute fees, prepare and sign Order of Payment, and issue Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO
steps.agency_action: 3. Prepare, review, and sign Locational Clearance
steps.person_responsible: Economist II / Administrative Officer IV / CPDC (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 4. Claim the locational clearance and sign in the logbook
steps.agency_action: 4. Release clearance and endorse plans

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transfer Certificate of Title/s (TCT) or any proof of ownership or right over the property – 2 photocopies

Lot plan with vicinity map if multiple titles

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements

steps.agency_action: 1.5 Verify approved land use in CLUP/Zoning Ordinance and counter check in GIS database

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.6 Compute corresponding fees
steps.person_responsible: Zoning Officer III / Planning Officer III (Lipa CPDO)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.7 Prepare Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.8 Sign Order of Payment

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.9 Advise applicant to pay at Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO and wait for the release of the Zoning Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Prepare the Zoning Certificate

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO and wait for the release of the Zoning Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3.2 Review Zoning Certificate and affix initial

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO and wait for the release of the Zoning Certificate

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the Lipa CPDO and wait for the release of the Zoning Certificate
steps.agency_action: 3.4 Release the Zoning Certificate

external_services.office: Lipa City Public Order and Safety Office
external_services.service_name: Approval of Subdivision Development Plan and Issuance of Development Permit
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Approval of Subdivision Development Plan and Issuance of Development
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: PALC Requirements: Plans (4 sets), Tax Receipt, Tax Declaration, TCTs, Vicinity Map, Lot Plan, Brgy Resolution, CTC, SEC Registration, DA Clearance, Reclassification Ordinance, Zoning Cert, Project Study, PCA Clearance
checklist_of_requirements.source: Various (CPDO, Treasurer, Assessor, Register of Deeds, etc.)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: DP Requirements: Revised Plan (6 sets), DAR Clearance/Conversion, BATELEC II Cert, MLWD Cert, NWRB Permit, DENR ECC
checklist_of_requirements.source: Various (Applicant, DAR, BATELEC, MLWD, NWRB, DENR)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements (PALC)
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive, check requirements, evaluate plans (8 days), and prepare Analysis/PALC

steps.client_step: 2. Pay PALC fees and submit OR
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Process payment, review and approve PALC, and release to proponent

steps.client_step: 3. Submit revised plan for Final Approval
steps.agency_action: 3.1 Review revised plans (5 days), prepare and approve final analysis, and endorse to City Administrator

steps.client_step: 4. Awaiting ordinance and Pay DP fees
steps.agency_action: 4.1 Compute DP fees, prepare permit, sign plans, and secure Mayor's signature

external_services.service_name: Approval for Alteration of Plan Permit

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter request and requirements
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Evaluate plans (5 days), prepare/approve analysis, and endorse to Sangguniang Panlungsod

steps.client_step: 2. Pay fees at Treasurer's and submit OR
steps.agency_action: 2.1 Prepare Permit, secure Mayor's signature, and release plans

external_services.total_fees_to_be_paid: Based on project density (e.g., P12,000 to P20,000/hectare)
